---
title: "Welcome to the Hogan Lab"
---

## Welcome!

We are excited to have you visit the Hogan Lab. We are a diverse group of clinicians, researchers, and trainees working to improve pediatric health outcomes through rigorous clinical and health services research.

## Our Focus

Our work centers on pediatric respiratory illness — bronchiolitis, RSV, asthma, and emerging conditions such as Cannabis Hyperemesis Syndrome — using large national datasets, clinical trials, and multi-center collaborations to generate evidence that changes practice.

## Our Approach

Our approach is methodologically diverse - we use whatever scientific methods are necessary to create rigorous, reproducible, and transparent research. As a member of our research community, you'll find:

- Large database and multi-center health services research
- Prospective cohort and clinical trial design
- Focus on pediatric respiratory and infectious disease outcomes
- Commitment to translating findings into clinical practice

[Learn more about our mission and values](mission.qmd)

## Latest News

::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-6}
### Recent Publications
- [Mapping Bronchiolitis in Connecticut Before and After the COVID-19 Pandemic.](https://doi.org/10.1002/ppul.71450) *Pediatric Pulmonology*, 2026.

- [Nirsevimab Effectiveness Against ICU Admission for RSV in Infants — 24 States.](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41348586/) *MMWR*, 2025.

- [Characterizing Long COVID Symptoms During Early Childhood.](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/40554463/) *JAMA Pediatrics*, 2025.

- [View all publications](publications.qmd)
:::

::: {.g-col-6}
### Lab Updates
- **2026:** New paper on bronchiolitis mapping in Connecticut published in *Pediatric Pulmonology*
- **2025:** Co-author on MMWR report of nirsevimab ICU effectiveness across 24 states
- **2025:** Co-author on ECHO RECOVER long COVID study in *JAMA Pediatrics*
- CHS clinical pathway and RCT program launching at CT Children's
:::
:::
